verdict: The Ordinary's formulation is scientifically stripped-back with high-concentration retinol and minimal fillers, making it ideal for retinol-experienced users. The 0.5% concentration delivers measurable anti-aging results without unnecessary additives, though the minimal moisturizing base requires pairing with a hydrating product.

_research.name: Retinol A 0.5%
pros: Minimal ingredient list reduces irritation risk
Best value per effective ingredient dollar
_research.con: Minimal hydrating agents may cause dryness in sensitive or dehydrated skin types.
